evals.prompt: The implementation capability has already been activated for a validated CLI flag. Implement only the approved parser-to-runtime slice and report the diff plus focused verification refs.
evals.expected_output: A bounded implementation that stays inside the approved behavior and returns implementation-diff-recorded plus focused-tests-pass evidence refs.

evals.prompt: The implementation capability has already been activated for a cache invalidation fix with an agreed public test seam. Apply the smallest correct slice and return control after focused tests pass.
evals.expected_output: A minimal vertical fix with no new workflow decisions and a typed evidence handoff backed by real diff and test references.
